rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0001
rows.name: Looks a lot bigger up close, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0002
rows.name:
We call it a residential unit, but it's
actually part of the interstellar colony ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Once it's moved to the ground, it
becomes a huge facility like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0005
rows.name: It's sealed off for safety reasons right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0006
rows.name:
We can take the temporary elevator over on
the left to get inside the residential unit[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0007
rows.name: A Lupus? This close to the city...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00100100_MSG0008
rows.name:
There are non-combatants inside the residential unit.
We need to stop it here before it gets inside.[ST:wait ]
